name: TrinityFirewall
description: Trinity-built AI-driven firewall and intrusion prevention system. Monitors network traffic, blocks IPs, detects port scans. Requires root for live sniffing.
author: Victory + Trinity

tools.name: firewall_start
tools.description: Start the TrinityAI firewall and intrusion detection system

tools.name: firewall_status
tools.description: Check firewall status — running, blocked IPs, log tail

tools.name: firewall_block_ip
tools.description: Add an IP to the blocked list

tools.name: firewall_unblock_ip
tools.description: Remove an IP from the blocked list

tools.name: firewall_read_log
tools.description: Read the firewall log — last N entries
